Title: Epic: Local AI Foundation
Body:
## Goal
Get the local agent runtime working on Windows with OpenClaw, Ollama, models, workspaces, and verified agent flows.

## Scope
- - Install Ollama and verify local runtime
- Pull local coding and embedding models
- Install OpenClaw and complete onboarding
- Create and validate agent workspaces
- Define agents in openclaw.json
- Smoke test all local agents

## Exit criteria
All P0 stories for Week 1 are completed and the weekly milestone outcome is demonstrably working.
Acceptance Criteria: Weekly milestone 'Week 1 — Local AI Foundation' achieved.

Title: Epic: Approvals and Safe Operations
Body:
## Goal
Introduce human approval gates for sensitive actions so the system cannot make risky client commitments or mutate durable memory unchecked.

## Scope
- - Create approvals domain model
- Implement ApprovalService
- Expose approval API endpoints
- Gate sensitive WhatsApp outbound messages
- Gate durable memory promotions
- Add approval queue and detail UI
- Add approval RBAC and audit trail
- Test approval and safety flows
